# Keccak-256 known-answer test vectors.
# Generated by util/gen_keccak256_kat.py.
# Inputs are deterministic SHAKE128 expansions of a fixed seed.
# Outputs are computed by pycryptodome (Crypto.Hash.keccak).
# ShortMsg: byte-aligned lengths 0..1088 bits.
#
# Format: Len is the message length in BITS (multiple of 8).
#         Msg is the message in lowercase hex (or "00" when Len = 0,
#         to match the SHA-3 KAT convention).
#         MD is the 256-bit Keccak-256 digest in lowercase hex.
